title: AgentTether: Graph-Guided Diagnosis and Runtime Intervention for Reliable LLM Agent Operation

text.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

paper_linked_release.additional_attempts: The repository metadata, file, and zipball API routes each independently returned HTTP 401 with the same not_connected response. Exact-ID and title/author web searches found the paper and secondary pages but no public release mirror or GitHub repository.
paper_linked_release.boundary: No release files, commit, tree, task membership, implementation, traces, or raw results were acquired. The paper's code-and-data availability statement therefore remains unaudited.

verification.pdfinfo_title: AgentTether: Graph-Guided Diagnosis and Runtime Intervention for Reliable LLM Agent Operation
verification.text_inspection: Non-empty extraction inspected from title and abstract through the method, evaluation tables, cross-model and intervention results, discussion, data-availability statement, conclusion, and final reference. Twelve page-break characters are present. Two UTF-8 replacement characters occur only in figure labels for TU symbols and do not affect prose extraction.
verification.source_archive_integrity: Archive listed successfully; 21 members include main.tex, eight section TeX files, bibliography, IEEE styles, README, and five figure PDFs.

review_boundary: This record establishes immutable-paper acquisition, successful full-text extraction, source-archive preservation, and a documented blocker for the paper-linked anonymous release. It is not a deep review and does not establish localization accuracy, causal-root validity, repair-memory transfer, intervention safety, task denominators beyond paper reporting, raw-result reproducibility, production reliability, professional validity, or deployment readiness.
